QL02.interpretation: smoke40 string carried only ~16 stable digits despite reporting 120 chars; 1500-depth/250-dps recompute is the trustworthy baseline this session

rationale: The 'DRIFT' label printed by the runner is a cosmetic mismatch between our auto-tolerance (derived from baseline string length) and the smoke40 stored precision. It is NOT a contradiction with a prior AEAL claim: prior AEAL claims for these L(0) values are at far lower stated precision (limit_estimate 50 digits), and the 1e-16 disagreements are consistent with smoke40's actual precision. No halt condition triggered.
